title: Quests
description: Quests is a modern plugin for Minecraft servers that adds a full—fledged quest system with a beautiful graphical interface, flexible customization, and support for multiple languages.
body:
_Quests is a modern plugin for Minecraft servers that adds a full—fledged quest system with a beautiful graphical interface, flexible customization, and support for multiple languages._

**What does this plugin add?**

The quest system: It allows you to create any kind of quests — to collect items, kill mobs, perform actions, and much more.
Beautiful and user-friendly menu: All interactions take place through a modern GUI that is intuitive to players.
Multilingualism: Supports Russian, English and Chinese languages out of the box. It is easy to add your own language through the config.
Flexible configuration: All quests, rewards, and texts are configured in YAML files. You can set unique rewards: money (Vault), items, commands, messages.
Limitations and progress: Quests can be one-time or repeatable, and the player's progress is saved.
Active Quest Menu: Players can keep track of their current quests and rewards.
Convenient admin commands: Issuing quests, resetting progress, viewing the list of quests, and reloading configs.
Full Tab-kit support: All commands are conveniently supplemented via Tab.

**Why choose this plugin?**

Maximum simplicity for players: All menu controls, no complicated commands.
Flexibility for admins: You can implement any scenarios — from simple daily tasks to complex quest chains.
Easy integration: Rewards can be given through any commands, which allows the plugin to integrate with the economy, stores, and other systems.
Full localization: All texts, buttons, hints and messages are translated through the config.

**Basic commands:**
**/quests** — open the quest menu
**/quests give <player> <questId>** — give a quest to the player
**/quests resetall** — reset the progress of all quests

**Who is this plugin for?**

For servers with RPG elements, survival, mini-games, and any projects that require tasks for players.
For administrators who want to give players more goals and motivation.

_Quests is the perfect choice for servers where atmosphere, player engagement, and easy task management are important!_
